issues.title: Enemy dealt 8 damage (67% of 12 HP) on floor 3
issues.description: At turn seq 249, floor 3 encounter 1, enemy dealt 8 damage when player had 12 HP. This is 67% of player's HP, exceeding the 50% threshold.

evidence.metric: Enemy dealt 8 damage (67% of player's 12 HP)

issues.suggestedFix: Review enemy damage scaling; consider capping single-hit damage relative to player max HP

issues.title: Player defeated on floor 3
issues.description: average profile was defeated on floor 3 with 73.62637362637363% accuracy. Final encounter against the_curator (boss), dealt 12 but took 16 damage. Early deaths discourage new players.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider reducing early floor difficulty or adding more healing opportunities

issues.title: Max combo stuck at 3 despite 74% accuracy — likely systemic combo cap bug
issues.description: Max combo across entire run is exactly 3 (182 cards played, 73.6% accuracy). All 9 encounters also capped at maxCombo <= 3. With this accuracy, higher combos should be achievable. This appears to be a systemic bug in the combo counting logic.

evidence.metric: maxCombo = 3 with 73.6% accuracy — systemic cap suspected

reproductionSteps: Achieve consecutive correct answers and observe combo counter
issues.suggestedFix: Investigate combo counter logic — appears to be capped at 3 instead of scaling to 5
